# Ryan Adamson — Luxury Real Estate
# Coldwell Banker Realty, St. Armands Circle, Sarasota, FL

> Ryan Adamson is a luxury real estate specialist at Coldwell Banker St. Armands, serving Sarasota, Florida and the barrier islands including Longboat Key, Lido Key, Siesta Key, St. Armands Circle, and Bird Key. This website provides current market data, neighborhood guides, and expert insights for the Sarasota coastal luxury real estate market.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://adamsonfl.com/): Overview of services and areas served
- [About Ryan Adamson](https://adamsonfl.com/about): Agent biography, credentials, and experience
- [Areas We Serve](https://adamsonfl.com/areas): Index of all covered neighborhoods and communities
- [Sarasota Market](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/sarasota): Sarasota real estate market data, pricing trends, and neighborhood guide
- [Longboat Key](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/longboat-key): Longboat Key luxury market data, waterfront properties, and island guide
- [Lido Key](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/lido-key): Lido Key real estate market data and beachfront living guide
- [Siesta Key](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/siesta-key): Siesta Key market data, beach properties, and area guide
- [St. Armands](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/st-armands): St. Armands Circle real estate and luxury lifestyle guide
- [Bird Key](https://adamsonfl.com/areas/bird-key): Bird Key private island community market data and guide
- [Market Reports](https://adamsonfl.com/market-reports): Monthly and quarterly market analysis with MLS-sourced data
- [Contact](https://adamsonfl.com/contact): Get in touch with Ryan Adamson

## Topics This Site Covers

- Sarasota luxury real estate market conditions (prices, inventory, days on market)
- Barrier island property values and trends (Longboat Key, Lido Key, Siesta Key)
- Waterfront and Gulf-front home buying guidance
- Neighborhood comparisons across Sarasota's coastal communities
- Monthly market reports with real MLS data
- Local area guides (dining, lifestyle, schools, amenities)
- Coldwell Banker St. Armands agent services

## Data Sources

Market data is sourced from the Stellar MLS (My Florida Regional MLS) and updated regularly. Statistics include median sale prices, average days on market, active inventory counts, and year-over-year trends for each community served.
